title: Ji Mo
content:
He was a cultivator that put a spell on Zhang Hu's body. When Wang Lin Killed Zhang Hu's body, Ji Mo was able to see everything that happened. In his anger, he sent 
Teng Huayuan
’s great-great-grandson to come after Wang Lin. He later met 
Wang Lin
 as he was heading to the Tang Clan and was killed by Wang Lin.

Deceased - (Donghua Ch.47)
